title: Direct air capture at scale: progress, challenges, and pathways
abstract: We review technological, economic, and policy trajectories for gigaton-scale direct air capture. Three pathways — solid-sorbent modular, liquid-solvent utility, and mineralization hybrids — are benchmarked against net-zero targets.

title: Mineral carbonation kinetics in basaltic reservoirs: a field-scale study
abstract: Field data from Icelandic basalt injection site shows 95% CO2 mineralization within 24 months, faster than laboratory predictions by factor of 1.8x.

title: Biochar as a scalable negative emissions pathway: lifecycle analysis across 12 feedstocks
abstract: Multi-feedstock LCA identifies agricultural residue biochar as lowest-cost (<$80/tCO2e) pathway with co-benefits for soil carbon.

title: Tandem perovskite-silicon solar cells cross 34% efficiency threshold
abstract: A vapor-deposition stabilization strategy lifts tandem efficiency to 34.2% with operational stability >1000 hours at 85°C.

title: Ocean alkalinity enhancement: promise, uncertainty, and governance
abstract: We propose a tiered governance framework for ocean alkalinity trials incorporating MRV, environmental safeguards, and benefit-sharing.

title: The afforestation gap: satellite evidence on planted forest carbon yields
abstract: Analysis of 27,000 plantations shows median realized carbon yields are 42% below reported baselines, driven by mortality and species mismatch.

title: Engineered carbonic anhydrase immobilization for post-combustion capture
abstract: A metal-organic framework host enhances enzyme turnover by 12x vs free enzyme, enabling continuous capture at flue-gas temperatures.

title: Carbon removal incentive design: lessons from the 45Q, CCfD, and ERF experiments
abstract: Comparative analysis of three major CDR incentive regimes reveals durability-pricing and MRV rigor as strongest determinants of project survival.

title: Low-temperature CO2 electrolysis to ethylene: a roadmap for industrial deployment
abstract: Bipolar membrane systems demonstrate 72% Faradaic efficiency for ethylene at ambient temperature with projected costs <$800/t by 2030.

title: Blue carbon restoration: quantifying 30-year sequestration trajectories in mangroves
abstract: Long-term monitoring of 68 mangrove restoration sites reveals cumulative sequestration of 2.8-4.1 tCO2/ha/yr with strong co-benefits for coastal protection.

title: Heat-exchanger thermodynamic limits for solid-sorbent DAC
abstract: First-principles thermodynamic bounds on solid-sorbent DAC systems show minimum 1.2 GJ/tCO2 theoretical, with current systems at 6-8 GJ/tCO2.

title: Storage capacity assessment for saline aquifers in Southeast Asia
abstract: Regional assessment identifies 140-210 GtCO2 storage capacity across Indonesian, Malaysian, and Vietnamese basins with suitability scoring.

title: Grid integration of 100% renewable systems: reliability under extreme weather
abstract: Multi-scenario modeling demonstrates 100% renewable grids maintain >99.95% reliability with 8-12 hour storage plus geographic dispersion.

title: BECCS deployment constraints: sustainability, land, and biodiversity trade-offs
abstract: Bioenergy with CCS pathways constrained to 1.5-3.5 GtCO2/yr by sustainable biomass availability without biodiversity loss.

title: Cryptographic verification of carbon removal: a registry architecture
abstract: We propose a distributed ledger architecture enabling third-party verification of carbon removal claims with 100x reduction in verification cost.
